name: MIO

design_style.overall: cute, chibi-inspired, cartoon-realistic with light anatomical grounding
design_style.shape_language: rounded, soft, friendly with disk-like silhouette
design_style.line_style: clean, bold outlines with smooth curves
design_style.rendering: digital illustration with soft gradients and subtle highlights

body_shape.proportion: slightly taller than wide to reflect mola mola anatomy
body_shape.note: less traditional fish shape, more 'floating head' appearance

appearance.head: large relative to body, integrated into the main body mass (no distinct neck)

eyes.details: bright highlights and gradient iris, often blue-toned

tail.style: soft scalloped shape with 2–3 gentle bumps

texture_and_lighting.lighting: soft top-left highlights with gentle shading

poses_and_states.default: 3/4 view, gently floating, open curious eyes
poses_and_states.sleeping: eyes closed, relaxed posture, slight tilt
poses_and_states.happy: wide eyes, open smile, subtle fin lift
poses_and_states.note: body tilt and eye shape drive expression more than limb movement

design_principles: keep shapes simple and readable at small sizes
